mapper.select:
select tenant_id as tenantId, charge_item_id as chargeItemId, item_code as itemCode, item_name as itemName, item_type as itemType, consumable_type as consumableType, spec_model as specModel, unit as unit, price as price, manufacturer as manufacturer, register_no as registerNo, is_active as isActive, referred_code as referredCode, value_level as valueLevel, his_create_time as hisCreateTime, his_update_time as hisUpdateTime, deleted_flag as deletedFlag, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime from his_charge_item_mirror where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and (deleted_flag is null or deleted_flag != 1)
and charge_item_id = #{chargeItemId}
and item_code like concat('%', #{itemCode}, '%')
and item_name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and referred_code like concat('%', #{referredCode}, '%')
and value_level = #{valueLevel}
and spec_model like concat('%', #{speci}, '%')
order by charge_item_id

select tenant_id as tenantId, charge_item_id as chargeItemId, item_code as itemCode, item_name as itemName, item_type as itemType, consumable_type as consumableType, spec_model as specModel, unit as unit, price as price, manufacturer as manufacturer, register_no as registerNo, is_active as isActive, referred_code as referredCode, value_level as valueLevel, his_create_time as hisCreateTime, his_update_time as hisUpdateTime, deleted_flag as deletedFlag, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime from his_charge_item_mirror where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and charge_item_id = #{chargeItemId} and (deleted_flag is null or deleted_flag != 1) limit 1
mapper.update: update his_charge_item_mirror set deleted_flag = 1, update_time = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and (deleted_flag is null or deleted_flag != 1)
mapper.insert:
insert into his_charge_item_mirror ( tenant_id, charge_item_id, item_code, item_name, item_type, consumable_type, spec_model, unit, price, manufacturer, register_no, is_active, referred_code, value_level, his_create_time, his_update_time, deleted_flag, create_time, update_time ) values
( #{r.tenantId}, #{r.chargeItemId}, #{r.itemCode}, #{r.itemName}, #{r.itemType}, #{r.consumableType}, #{r.specModel}, #{r.unit}, #{r.price}, #{r.manufacturer}, #{r.registerNo}, #{r.isActive}, #{r.referredCode}, '2', #{r.hisCreateTime}, #{r.hisUpdateTime}, 0, now(), now() )
on duplicate key update item_code = values(item_code), item_name = values(item_name), item_type = values(item_type), consumable_type = values(consumable_type), spec_model = values(spec_model), unit = values(unit), price = values(price), manufacturer = values(manufacturer), register_no = values(register_no), is_active = values(is_active), referred_code = values(referred_code), his_create_time = values(his_create_time), his_update_time = values(his_update_time), deleted_flag = 0, update_time = now()
